description: What You’ll Do Develop backend APIs and services based on defined architecture Integrate with external APIs (with guidance and documentation) Build and maintain internal dashboards and admin tools Implement data processing and synchronization tasks Debug issues and improve system reliability Collaborate with senior engineers / founders on system design decisions What You’ll Be Responsible For Writing clean, maintainable, production-ready code Following established patterns and architecture Delivering features end-to-end (with support) Handling basic API integrations and data transformations Adjusted Technical Expectations Backend (Core) Node.js (TypeScript) OR Python REST API development Basic understanding of async processes Integration (Scoped Down) Consuming external APIs Handling common API issues (timeouts, retries, errors) Basic webhook handling Frontend React (building dashboards from existing designs or patterns) Data PostgreSQL (basic queries, schema usage) Understanding CRUD + simple optimizations Cloud (Limited Ownership) Familiar with AWS/GCP basics Deploying services using existing pipelines (not designing them) Requirements 1–3 years experience (or strong fresh grad with projects) Demonstrated ability to build working applications GitHub or portfolio showing real code
